name: @ts-fix/mcp-effect
description: The ts-fix MCP (Model Context Protocol) server (stdio), Effect-TS slice. Exposes the linter to coding agents via three tools (ts_fix_diagnose / ts_fix_explain / ts_fix_list_rules). The pure handlers are a faithful port of legacy `packages/mcp/src/tools.ts`, rewired onto the modern engine/format/registry slices; the SDK wiring (`packages/mcp/src/server.ts`) swaps tool-argument validation from zod to `effect/Schema` (RULE-029). zod is GONE.
